info.name: Stylize MCP Server API Tests
info.description: A collection of requests to test the Stylize MCP Server API.

item.name: Service Endpoints
item.description: Basic service health and information endpoints.

request.description: Checks the health status of the service.
Retrieves the list of available image stylization styles from app/styles.json.

formdata.description: Select your JPEG or PNG image file here.
Enter a valid style_id from GET /styles (e.g., 'van_gogh', 'pixel_art', 'flat_ui_icon').

formdata.value: A majestic mountain landscape at sunset

request.description: Tests basic image stylization with only an image and style_id. Remember to select an image file for the 'image' key.

item.name: Stylize Image - With Project Context (No Reference Logo)

formdata.description: Select your JPEG or PNG image file here.

formdata.value:
{
    "project_name": "My Cool App",
    "project_description": "A mobile app for tracking delightful cats.",
    "keywords": ["cat", "mobile", "fun", "pet care"],
    "brand_colors": ["#FF69B4", "#4682B4"],
    "artistic_mood": "playful",
    "target_audience": "cat lovers of all ages"
}
formdata.description: JSON string providing project context. Ensure this is valid JSON.

request.description: Tests image stylization with project context (excluding a reference logo). Remember to select an image file.

item.name: Stylize Image - With Project Context (And Reference Logo)

formdata.description: Select your JPEG or PNG image file here (e.g., a rough sketch for the logo).

formdata.value: Refresh this logo concept, make it clean and modern.
formdata.description: (Optional) Additional user instructions for the refresh.

formdata.value:
{
    "project_name": "NextGen SaaS Platform",
    "project_description": "Refreshing an existing company logo to be more modern and tech-focused.",
    "artistic_mood": "sleek and innovative",
    "brand_colors": ["#0052CC", "#FFFFFF", "#172B4D"],
    "keywords": ["technology", "software", "cloud", "modern"],
    "reference_logo_image_base64": "iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNkYAAAAAYAAjCB0C8AAAAASUVORK5CYII="
}
formdata.description: JSON string providing project context including a base64 encoded reference_logo_image. Replace the base64 string with an actual small image's base64. Ensure this is valid JSON.

request.description: Tests image stylization with project context including a base64 encoded reference logo. Remember to select a primary image file and replace the placeholder base64 string with actual data.
